commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And of Zebulun he said, Rejoice, Zebulun, in your going out; and, Issachar, in your tents. (Calmet) The territory of Zabulon had the Mediterranean sea on the west, and the lake of Tiberias, into which the Jordan flowed, on the east. (Haydock) By the advantages of their situation, and by the example of the Tyrians, the people were induced to engage in commerce, and to study the art of navigation. Tabernacles. Issachar preferred staying at home to cultivate his rich soil, Genesis xlix.
